creator: hoek@hwcn.org
text:
On Tue, 3 Mar 1998, Andrey Zakhvatov wrote:

>    XNibbles is a game for X11R6.  It is conceptually  based on 
> nibbles, which was a program that came with qbasic for MS-DOS.

Which in turn bears a striking similiarity to an old game called
"RunRound" written in Basic on my XT. 


--
Outnumbered?  Maybe.  Outspoken?  Never!
tIM...HOEk
